name: khush-enterprises
description: Khush Enterprises - Scientific Laboratory Equipment Platform

scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.copy:frontend: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function copyDir(s,d){fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(s)){const sp=path.join(s,f),dp=path.join(d,f);fs.statSync(sp).isDirectory()?copyDir(sp,dp):fs.copyFileSync(sp,dp)}}copyDir('frontend/out','backend/public')"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run copy:frontend && npm run build:backend
